title: aconitum glandulosum
intro: Aconitum glandulosum, also known as the glandular monk's hood or glandular aconite, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the nervous system. The health benefits of Aconitum glandulosum include its potential to treat pain, fever, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Aconitum glandulosum is often prepared as a tincture or decoction for use in herbal remedies, and is typically used in small amounts due to its potential toxicity.
